summary: Translated JP source (held in EN asset bundle) to Vietnamese. 1 title + 96 message records, all 97 translatable text fields translated. Structural QA independent-verify PASS: line count 1038=1038, BOM preserved, CRLF preserved, 0 delimiter mismatches, 0 technical-field changes, 0 tag mismatches, 0 placeholder mismatches, 0 ASCII commas inside VI text fields.
notes: Source EN asset bundle actually contains JP text for this project; ja.json/en.json were JP/blank reference only. Translation driven by asset text field order.
Title translated to Vietnamese Title Case: 決着！　勝負の行方は……！？ -> Quyết Đấu! Kết Cục Trận Đấu Là……!?
Commander 司令官 -> Chỉ Huy; male Commander first-person 俺 -> anh; women (Aura/Lucita) first-person アタシ -> tôi; mutual second-person アンタ/おまえ -> cậu; ワタシ -> tôi.
Speaker names kept unchanged per rules (no explicit mapping): ルシータ, アウラ, <user> (Commander), ルシータ・アウラ (dual).
Character voices: Aura = confident rival merchant (tôi/cậu, teasing); Lucita = earnest ex-pirate merchant (tôi/anh to Commander, cậu to Aura); Commander =  anh/cậu.

Placeholders/tags (
, voice IDs, chara IDs, scene IDs) preserved exactly; one dropped
in message #14 restored to match source tag count.
All ASCII commas inside VI prose converted to U+201A (‚) to protect delimiter integrity.
No H18 content in this scene; no adult-content handling needed. No kept-English text records.
Manifest, focused_diff.md, qa_log.json and generate_vi.py written to work/hmn_10190100003_full.
